mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(SUM(w.spent_hour), 0) FROM work_time w LEFT JOIN task t ON w.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id
w.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND w.user_code = #{userCode}
AND w.work_date >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND w.work_date <= TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD')
AND tt.type_name IN
#{type}

SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(th.action_at + INTERVAL '9' HOUR, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS action_date FROM task_history th INNER JOIN task t ON th.task_id = t.task_id LEFT JOIN users u ON th.changed_by = u.user_code LEFT JOIN task_types tt ON t.type_id = tt.type_id LEFT JOIN task_history_detail d_type ON th.history_id = d_type.history_id AND d_type.field_name = 'type_name'
t.project_id = TO_NUMBER(#{projectId})
AND u.user_code = #{userCode}
AND th.action_at >= TO_DATE(#{startDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') - INTERVAL '9' HOUR
AND th.action_at < TO_DATE(#{endDate}, 'YYYY.MM.DD') + INTERVAL '1' DAY - INTERVAL '9' HOUR
AND NVL(d_type.new_value, tt.type_name) IN
#{type}
ORDER BY action_date DESC
